ddls:
CREATE TABLE "credit_applications" (
  "application_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit application */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "application_date" TEXT /* Date when the application was submitted */,
  "application_status" TEXT /* Current status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected) */,
  "account_balance" INTEGER /* Account balance of the applicant */,
  "credit_duration_months" INTEGER /* Duration of credit in months */,
  "previous_credit_payment_status" INTEGER /* Previous credit payment status */,
  "credit_purpose" INTEGER /* Purpose of the credit (e.g., personal loan, mortgage, credit card) */,
  "credit_amount" INTEGER /* Amount of credit applied for */,
  "savings" INTEGER /* Savings of the applicant */,
  "employment_duration" INTEGER /* Employment duration of the applicant */,
  "installment_rate" INTEGER /* Installment rate of the credit */,
  "marital_status" INTEGER /* Marital status of the applicant */,
  "guarantor" INTEGER /* Guarantor for the credit */,
  "residence_duration" INTEGER /* Residence duration of the applicant */,
  "current_assets" INTEGER /* Current assets of the applicant */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the applicant */,
  "other_credits" INTEGER /* Other credits held by the applicant */,
  "apartment_type" INTEGER /* Type of apartment (e.g., rented, owned) */,
  "bank_credits" INTEGER /* Bank credits held by the applicant */,
  "occupation" INTEGER /* Occupation of the applicant */,
  "dependents" INTEGER /* Number of dependents */,
  "telephone" INTEGER /* Telephone number of the applicant */,
  "foreign_worker" INTEGER /* Foreign worker status */,
  "credit_rating" INTEGER /* Credit rating of the applicant */,
  "income_source" TEXT /* Primary source of income */,
  "employer_name" TEXT /* Name of the employer */,
  "credit_bureau_score" REAL /* Credit score from external credit bureaus */,
  "loan_type" TEXT /* Type of loan (e.g., personal, mortgage, credit card) */,
  "interest_rate" REAL /* Interest rate offered for the loan */,
  "repayment_term" INTEGER /* Term for repayment */,
  "co_applicant_info" TEXT /* Details of any co-applicant */,
  "documentation_status" TEXT /* Status of required documents */,
  "regulatory_compliance_status" TEXT /* Compliance status with regulatory requirements */,
  "audit_trail" TEXT /* Log of all changes made to the application */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("application_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "credit_scores" (
  "score_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each credit score */,
  "application_id" INTEGER /* ID of the credit application */,
  "credit_score" REAL /* Calculated credit score */,
  "score_date" TEXT /* Date the credit score was calculated */,
  "score_model_used" TEXT /* Machine learning model used to calculate the score */,
  "score_version" TEXT /* Version of the scoring model */,
  "score_details" TEXT /* Additional details or metadata about the score calculation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("score_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_credit_scores_application_id FOREIGN KEY ("application_id") REFERENCES credit_applications ("application_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each credit application
Date when the application was submitted
Current status of the application (e.g., pending, approved, rejected)
Purpose of the credit (e.g., personal loan, mortgage, credit card)
Other credits held by the applicant
Bank credits held by the applicant
Credit score from external credit bureaus
Type of loan (e.g., personal, mortgage, credit card)
Interest rate offered for the loan
Log of all changes made to the application
Unique identifier for each credit score
Date the credit score was calculated
Machine learning model used to calculate the score
Additional details or metadata about the score calculation
